parameters.name: delete_children
parameters.description: If true, child nodes will be deleted. Otherwise, they will be connected to this node's parent.

parameters.name: XF-Api-User
parameters.description: User ID to execute the request as. Requires a super user API key.

parameters.name: api_bypass_permissions
parameters.description: Whether or not to bypass the context user permissions. Requires a super user API key.
